content.problemStatement:
Given a mergeSort function that accepts an array as a parameter, sort the array using the **Merge sort** algorithm.

Video Explanation

solution.timeComplexity:
The time complexity of Merge Sort is O(n log n), where n is the number of elements in the array. The n log n arises because:

The array is split log n times (since each split halves the array).
Each merge operation takes O(n) time to combine the elements.
solution.spaceComplexity: The space complexity is O(n) due to the additional space used by the temporary vectors a, b, and res. These vectors are necessary for storing the elements during the merging process.
